title: Google and Kaggle Launch Free AI Agents Coding Course
summary: Google and Kaggle are offering a free 5-day intensive course on AI agents. The course is designed for beginners and covers practical skills in building AI applications.
body:
Google and Kaggle are teaming up to bring back their popular 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course. This free course is designed to help beginners understand and build AI applications. The course covers the basics of AI agents, how they work, and practical ways to implement them in real-world projects.

This course is perfect for anyone curious about AI but not sure where to start. Think of it like a crash course in building smart assistants or automated systems. You'll learn how to create AI that can perform tasks, answer questions, and even make decisions. No prior coding experience is required, making it accessible to everyone.

If you're interested, you can sign up now on Kaggle's website. The course starts in June 2026 and runs for five consecutive days. This is a great opportunity to get hands-on experience with AI agents and see what you can create. Keep an eye out for more details and registration deadlines.
twitterThread:
🚀 Want to learn AI but don't know where to start?

Google and Kaggle are bringing back their FREE 5-day AI Agents Intensive Course. No coding experience needed!

In plain English: This course teaches you how to build AI that can do things like answer questions or make decisions.

Think of it like building your own smart assistant.
The part that matters: You'll get hands-on experience creating AI agents. Perfect for beginners who want to dive into AI without feeling overwhelmed.
If you've ever wanted to understand AI but felt intimidated, this is your chance. The course starts in June 2026 and runs for five days straight.
Sign up now on Kaggle's website. It's free and a great way to see what you can create with AI agents.
